text: I am standing before a glass-walled room marked by vibrant colors and bold text—R+D. The words inside speak of research, development, and the interplay of human perception and technology. I feel a sense of curiosity and a slight disorientation, as the lighting and reflections cast everything in a dreamlike haze. The displayed phrase about confusion and clarity resonates with me; it mirrors my own uncertainty in this space, reminding me how perception can easily blur and how quickly focus can shift. There’s a hum of potential discovery here, mingled with an awareness of how fragile understanding can be.
